form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Dynasty at Ashburton Raceway over 1700m in a 4yo+ M on March 25 at $3.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Luvavici at Motukarara Raceway over 2170m in a 3yo+ on April 6 at $3.50. Further improvement to come so worth following.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by a neck (Fr6) at this track (3:13.20) beating Macho Man in on March 22 at $4.40. Two runs back won by 2.25 m (Fr4) at Addington (2:31.50) beating Lap It Up in 3yo+ on February 27 at $4.50. Can maintain the solid form.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr9) over 2170m at Motukarara Raceway beaten 10 m by Luvavici (2:50.30) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $9.60. Two runs back 4th (Fr2) over 2600m at Addington, at the bell was 2nd-4.3m on the pegs beaten 3 m by The Royal Gamble (3:22.00) in 3yo+ on August 22 at $5.40. Solid prospect with that run under the belt.

form.formComment: Returns after five months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation recording a big 17 m win as favourite (20m 7) at Central Southland Raceway (3:04.40) beating Superfast Lady in 3yo+ on November 9 at $2 at the bell was 13th-38.7+m. Previous preparation first-up won by 9 m (Fr4) at Oamaru (3:24.80) beating Prestigious in 3yo+ on September 14 at $2.30. Has won when fresh in the past and looks primed for this after a recent trial placing.
